Join Our Team at Lansdowne Animal Hospital! 

 

Part-Time Associate Veterinarian – Old Ottawa South, Ottawa

 

Love veterinary medicine and being part of a close-knit community? We might be the perfect fit for you.

 

At Lansdowne Animal Hospital, we’ve been caring for the beloved pets of Old Ottawa South since 1995. As an independently owned clinic, we pride ourselves on combining modern medicine with genuine community connection, compassionate care, and a supportive team culture.

 

We’re looking for an experienced Part-Time Associate Veterinarian to join our amazing team of 14 staff members and 3 veterinarians.

 

Why You’ll Love Working Here

 

 Team Medicine Approach
You’ll never feel like you’re doing it all alone. Our Veterinary Assistants and Technicians support consultations by gathering histories, assisting with appointments, and taking notes while you focus on patient care.

 

 Modern, Well-Equipped Practice
We’re fully equipped to provide high-quality care with:

Digital body & dental radiography
Onsite ultrasound
Fully equipped surgical suite
Dedicated dental suite
In-house
